calendar.matters:
Motion To Set Aside Entry Of Default
Off Calendar Mar-09-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT EDUARDO ORDONEZ Motion To Set Aside Entry Of Default

The unopposed motion to set aside entry of default is granted for good cause shown in the moving papers.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
